_meta.shape: Raw __NEXT_DATA__.props.pageProps.__APOLLO_STATE__ subset: SoldProperty:<booliId> keys + one Area_V3 context object, exactly as server-rendered.
_meta.redaction: streetAddress / location / latitude / longitude / url / images / descriptiveAreaName redacted; screenReaderLabel street name+number stripped. Retained: soldPrice.raw, listPrice, soldPriceAbsoluteDiff, soldPricePercentageDiff.raw, soldDate, objectType, daysActive, displayAttributes.dataPoints (m2/rooms/tomt/kr-per-m2).
_meta.note: One record carries a null soldPrice.raw to exercise the null-tolerant normalizer + areaAvg-guard test cases.
